scene_descriptions.description: Opening void — Neural pathways igniting in darkness
scene_descriptions.notes: Black screen, cursor blinks, neural pathways form. Low cinematic drone.
Neural pathways multiply, filling frame with light. 'Not gradually... All at once.'

scene_descriptions.description: Crossroads figure — Human silhouette at two diverging paths
scene_descriptions.notes: Piano enters. 'They require taste.' Text on screen at ~40s.

scene_descriptions.description: Mara's office — 4 AM warm lighting, two monitors, focused work
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: Mara's Story (0:45). Warm tone. She's been doing this for nine years.

scene_descriptions.description: The message — Chat notification appearing on screen
scene_descriptions.notes: Chat bubble: 'We used an AI tool...' Then text overlay. Hollow tone SFX.

scene_descriptions.description: Mara studying AI tools — Time-lapse of screen activity
scene_descriptions.notes: Mara experiments with Midjourney, Firefly, Figma AI, Runway. Not replacing — multiplying.

scene_descriptions.description: AI as raw material — Rivers of AI output shaped by human hands
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: Intelligence Without Taste (3:00). Strings enter. Emotional swell.

scene_descriptions.description: Selection moment — Hands choosing exceptional from mediocre
scene_descriptions.notes: Multiple AI outputs, some brilliant, most mediocre. Hands select the best.

scene_descriptions.description: Revenue comparison — Animated bar chart, old vs new
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: New Business Model (4:15 = 255s, starts ~3:30). Data viz with bar chart.

scene_descriptions.description: Global map of nodes — Thousands at the crossroads
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: Happening Everywhere (5:00). Camera pulls back. Most nodes standing still.

scene_descriptions.description: Chain reaction — Professions lighting up across the map
scene_descriptions.notes: Writers, developers, marketers, analysts each trigger new clusters. 'Right now.'

scene_descriptions.description: Two nodes diverging — One bright, one dimming
scene_descriptions.notes: Gap reveal. 'Because they adapted sooner.' Low rumble SFX.

scene_descriptions.description: Nodes re-brightening — Hope returning, ripple of light
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: Window Still Open (6:15). Full cinematic swell. Emotional peak. 'You're early enough.'

scene_descriptions.description: Final crossroads — Figure steps forward, dissolves into V-Real AI logo
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: This Is V-Real AI (7:30). Piano returns. 'You're not paranoid. You're observant.' Logo resolve.
